title: 第 13 課｜約化質量：把兩體變成一體｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
從兩個互相作用的粒子出發，分離質心平移，並用相對座標 r = r₁ − r₂ 將兩體問題化為單粒子問題。本課介紹約化質量 μ = m₁m₂/(m₁ + m₂)，以及相對運動的拉格朗日量 L = ½μṙ² − U(r)。

Landau–Lifshitz《力學》雙語動畫課程，第 13 課。

title: Lesson 13 | Reduced Mass: Two Bodies into One | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
Starting with two interacting particles, we separate the translation of the centre of mass and use the relative coordinate r = r₁ − r₂ to reduce the two-body problem to a one-particle problem. This lesson introduces the reduced mass μ = m₁m₂/(m₁ + m₂) and the relative Lagrangian L = ½μṙ² − U(r).

Bilingual animated course based on Landau and Lifshitz's Mechanics, Lesson 13.
